_doc: Append-only history of the Studios Manifesto. Newest revision first. Each revision is paragraph-split (es/en) so the /changelog page can diff paragraph-by-paragraph. Weather snapshot captures Lima conditions at publish time (so the Living Manifesto's typographic mood is legible retrospectively). Operator workflow: when editing the manifesto in index.html, also append an entry here BEFORE pushing. Keep the revision short and the `note` single-line.

revisions.note_es: Primera versión pública. Una carilla. Cinco párrafos que separan el taller del feed.
revisions.note_en: First public version. One page. Five paragraphs separating workshop from feed.
paragraphs_es: Rainey Laguna Studios hace cosas. Cosas que se miran, que se tocan, que duran.

Creemos que una marca que no puede llegar a la mesa no es una marca — es una teoría. Diseñamos en pantalla y fabricamos en taller. Tipografía, impresos, objetos en 3D, hidrografía, y todo lo que un lugar necesita tener para ser recordado fuera del teléfono.
Trabajamos desde Lima, con raíces en Glasgow. Pensamos despacio, respondemos rápido, y no entregamos nada que no pongamos primero sobre la mesa.
Si buscas web, te atendemos en raineylaguna.com — nuestra rama especializada para negocios locales en Lima. Si buscas cualquier otra cosa — aquí.
paragraphs_en: Rainey Laguna Studios makes things. Things you look at, things you hold, things that last.

We believe a brand that can't reach the table isn't a brand — it's a theory. We design on screen and fabricate in the workshop. Typography, print, 3D-printed objects, hydroprinted finishes, and whatever else a place needs to be remembered off the phone.
We work from Lima, with roots in Glasgow. We think slowly, we answer quickly, and we don't ship anything we haven't first put on the table.
If you need web, we handle that at raineylaguna.com — our specialist arm for Lima local businesses. For anything else — here.
